title: (Bearish Signal) KNSA, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on June 01, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, A.I.dvisor has detected that KNSA's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for KNSA, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 137 similar cases, 122 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 89%. Current price $13.30 crossed the support line at $18.28 and is trading between $18.28 support and $13.17 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/29/21 - 06/01/21, the price experienced a -22% Downtrend. During the week of 05/24/21 - 06/01/21, the stock fell -3%.

https://preview.redd.it/gjtjmc04sv271.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=f594c85f384fe1b9fcd2d8af3466018e24607eaa

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 50-day Moving Average for KNSA moved below the 200-day moving average on May 12, 2021. This could be a long-term bearish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where KNSA declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 83%.

The Aroon Indicator for KNSA entered a downward trend on June 01, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.
